datasets.name: base_dataset
queryLines: SELECT * FROM <カタログ名>.<スキーマ名>.sales_silver

columns.expression:
CASE
  WHEN discount_rate = 0 THEN '割引なし'
  WHEN discount_rate < 0.2 THEN '小割引'
  WHEN discount_rate < 0.5 THEN '中割引'
  ELSE '大割引'
END

CASE
  WHEN sales_amount = 0 THEN '利益なし'
  WHEN profit / sales_amount >= 0.2 THEN '高利益'
  WHEN profit / sales_amount >= 0.1 THEN '中利益'
  ELSE '低利益'
END

columns.displayName: 単価カテゴリ（Unit Price Band）
columns.expression:
CASE
  WHEN quantity = 0 THEN '単価不明'
  WHEN sales_amount / quantity >= 50000 THEN '高単価'
  WHEN sales_amount / quantity >= 10000 THEN '中単価'
  ELSE '低単価'
END

CASE
  WHEN returned THEN '返品'
  ELSE '通常'
END
